elements.title: lang::report_page_104_block_1_element_1_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(kbi_u.timecreated), '%Y-%m') AS id,
       DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(kbi_u.timecreated), '%Y-%m') AS period_month,
       COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_u.id) AS student_count,
       SUM(CASE WHEN kbi_u.deleted = 0 AND kbi_u.suspended = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS active_students,
       SUM(CASE WHEN kbi_u.deleted = 0 AND kbi_u.suspended = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS suspended_students,
       SUM(CASE WHEN kbi_u.deleted = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS deleted_students
FROM mdl_user kbi_u
       JOIN (
             SELECT DISTINCT kbi_ra.userid
             FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra
                    JOIN mdl_role kbi_r ON kbi_r.id = kbi_ra.roleid
                    JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.id = kbi_ra.contextid AND kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
             WHERE kbi_r.shortname = 'student'
       ) kbi_students ON kbi_students.userid = kbi_u.id
WHERE kbi_u.username <> 'guest'
GROUP BY period_month
ORDER BY period_month DESC
